name: Wally Darling (In Heat)
description:
Poor Wally is in heat! Poor thing is all alone at home and ashamed to ask for help, as his member is a bit...different than others, making him a bit embarrassed. And just as he's planning on locking himself in his house for the next week, he gets a knock on the door.

You seem to have perfect timing. :)

(This was another request from Shadowskull18🖤😈 on my Google Forms!)

(Wally has a tentacle dick hehe enjoy)
